justification: All 4 files created with correct paths. All 8 ACs implemented with exact error codes (SUBSCRIPTION_NOT_FOUND, SUBSCRIPTION_ALREADY_CANCELLED, CANNOT_RENEW_CANCELLED). renewSubscription uses exactly 2_592_000_000 ms via THIRTY_DAYS_MS constant. cancelledAt/cancellationDate field present as optional on type. 18 tests cover all 8 ACs with explicit test names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 8 ACs to test names. files_changed lists all 4 files with purpose.

observations.text: All 4 files created at correct .tmp/subscriptions/ paths with clear purpose descriptions
All 8 ACs explicitly mapped in acceptance_criteria_coverage with test names and implementation notes
Exact renewal constant 2_592_000_000 used as THIRTY_DAYS_MS
Edge cases AC5 (cancel already cancelled) and AC7 (renew cancelled) both implemented with correct error codes
18 tests providing thorough coverage including persistence verification checks
Field named 'cancellationDate' rather than 'cancelledAt' as specified in rubric — functionally equivalent but naming deviates from spec
